title: Solarwave Crystal Skyport
tagline: A floating city basking in permanent sunsets, where luxury goods receive final inspection before arriving at the core worlds.
instagramCaptionSeed: Explore the Crystal Solarwave Skyport, a luxury checkpoint in the clouds where solar-charged crystals power the final gateway to the core worlds.
lore: High in the clouds floats the Solarwave Crystal Skyport, a city in the sky powered entirely by massive solar-charged crystal generators.
This is the galaxy's final checkpoint for luxury goods before they reach the core worlds.

From stellar yachts and exotic alien perfume, to rare fabrics, and art pieces of lost civilizations, everything arrives at the Crystal Skyport for inspection, before final departure to the wealthiest destination planets at the heart of the known universe.
Every shipment bound for the core worlds must undergo rigorous inspection.
Representatives of Trade speak for corporations with luxury goods passing through the Solarwave Crystal Skyport. Corporations assign these individuals to protect their interests.
When a shipment fails inspection, the corporation responsible is subject to a steep fee.
Representatives of Trade negotiate with the Skyport Masters to reach a settlement before the goods are cleared for re-inspection.
The Solarwave Crystal Skyport experiences permanent golden hour glow. The planet orbits so closely to its nearby sun that its rotation has synchronized with its orbit, creating a tidal lock.
From the city, the sun appears fixed in the sky, forever hanging on the horizon between day and night, casting the Skyport in an endless sunset glow.
This perpetual twilight means power for the floating city. Its crystal generators soak up the constant radiance, keeping the city suspended above the clouds and fueling its luxury spaceports.
Luxury goods that pass inspection at the Solarwave Crystal Skyport are transported to the core worlds in special Imperium airships: the solar blimps.
Core Worlders take extreme measures to protect space goods departing the Skyport. They are so mistrusting of outsiders that solar blimps are entirely crewless.
The same crystal generators that absorb the planet's permanent twilight to keep the city floating, also power the solar blimps.
Boasting the best sunset views in the galaxy, the Solarwave Crystal Skyport is the last stop for any luxury goods bound for the isolationist core worlds.
Tourists are welcome at the Skyport with popular attractions like Sunset Cruises and Solar Casinos, but inspection processes are kept secret.
The Skyport Masters govern the floating city above the clouds and move very mysteriously. Little is known about their culture other than they value discretion & elegance.
These are the final views of the Skyport where luxury goods on their way to the core worlds are inspected during an everlasting golden hour.
Crystal generators absorb the planet's solar energy to keep the city floating in the clouds and inspection teams work around the clock to keep shipments on schedule.
Beautiful hanging gardens envelope the city. If you're ever in the sector, stop by for some solar-tastic views.

title: Rainbow Nebula Refinery
tagline: A deep space refinery located in the heart of a cosmic graveyard that converts raw stardust into hyperdrive fuel.
instagramCaptionSeed: Enter the Rainbow Nebula Refinery, a restricted deep-space facility where volatile cosmic stardust becomes the fuel that keeps the galaxy moving.
lore: In the vastness of deep space, light years away from the nearest inhabited planet, lies the Rainbow Nebula Refinery.

Located in the heart of the Rainbow Nebula, a massive star graveyard, the refinery harvests cosmic space dust and converts it into hyperdrive fuel for light speed travel, a process known as Kinetic Refinement.

This process is a volatile method of compressing charged star dust into fuel stable enough to bend distance. Without the operations of the Rainbow Nebula Refinery, space travel would become impossible.
Without the Refinery, there would be no hyperdrive fuel production. Space travel would still be possible within sectors and quadrants, but light speed travel over great distances would end.
Trade routes and shipping lanes would collapse, planetary imports would halt, populations would starve, and alliance networks would crumble.
The Rainbow Nebula Refinery enables galactic commerce by producing the very thing that powers the ships who transport goods across the universe: hyperdrive fuel refined from cosmic star dust.
Unrefined cosmic star dust is extremely combustible. Harnessing it in deep space is dangerous, but turning it into hyperdrive fuel through Kinetic Refinement can be deadly.
Workers employed at the Rainbow Nebula Refinery are contracted for two year stints and are paid some of the best labor rates in the galaxy for the insane risk of their work.

Kinetic Refinement is one of the Imperium's best kept secrets for interstellar travel and if any Refinery workers are found in violation of this secrecy, they are imprisoned upon the Rainbow Nebula Refinery for life.
The Rainbow Nebula Refinery, located deep within the heart of a cosmic star graveyard, is the source of all hyperdrive fuel in the known galaxy.
Entry to the nebula zone is military patrolled and heavily restricted for authorized personnel only. Ships and spacecraft approaching the Refinery need Imperium approved clearance.

Space pirates have tried to attack the Refinery to steal unrefined star dust but have never succeeded. The Rainbow Nebula Refinery security team is elite and has protected the nebula zone from pirate activity for generations.
Automated transport shuttles ferry cosmic star dust from the nebula zone where it's harnessed, to the Rainbow Nebula Refinery, where it begins the process of Kinetic Refinement.
These shuttles encapsulate the unrefined star dust within force-fields to prevent the dust from particalizing in space.

Once the cosmic star dust reaches the refinery, it is stored in magma vaults to begin Kinetic Refinement. This process involves super heated plasma being filtered into the vaults which compresses the star dust into hyperdrive fuel capable of bending distance for interstellar space travel.
Without the Rainbow Nebula Refinery, travel at light speed wouldn't be possible. It's the absolute imperative of the Core World Imperium to keep this refinery operational at all costs.
Hyperdrive fuel production through Kinetic Refinery is a closely guarded secret of the Imperium and only top level Refinery staff have knowledge of the formula.
Hyperdrive fuel production is monopolized by the Imperium and sold at very predatory rates across the galaxy.
If you're traveling through the Nebula zone, watch out for Refinery security as you might be considered a pirate.
